calendar.matters:
For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms, Naming Successor Trustees
Off Calendar Aug-14-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: JULIUS LICHTENSTEIN, PETITIONER, TOM SULLIVAN, APPEARING WITH THE PETITIONER

PETITIONER HAS BEEN TRUSTEE FOR 17 YEARS AND IS STATING THAT HE HAS NO FUNDS IN WHICH TO PROPERLY HANLDE THIS TRUST.THE ALTERNATE SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE HAS PASSED WAY AND THERE IS NO OTHER ALTERNATE. THE COURT STATES THAT THE TRUSTEE SAID THE SAME THING AT THE PREVIOUS HEARING AND SUGGEST THAT HE RETAIN COUNSEL. THIS MATTER WAS DENIED.

JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN; REPORTER: ARLENE HOWELL, CSR#2542, CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON, BALIFF:M. LOOS
